response:
```sql
SELECT 
    government_form, 
    SUM(population) AS total_population
FROM 
    countries
WHERE 
    government_form IN (
        SELECT 
            government_form
        FROM 
            countries
        GROUP BY 
            government_form
        HAVING 
            AVG(life_expectancy) > 72
    )
GROUP BY 
    government_form;
```
